introTemplate: Hi, I'm Purandhar, a {age}-year-old Full Stack Developer based in Chennai. I began my journey into web development through The Odin Project, where I learned by building real-world projects from the ground up. That project-based approach shaped how I solve problems and develop software.

Alongside full-stack development, I studied AI and Machine Learning during university and am currently strengthening my fundamentals by building AI-powered projects and exploring modern LLM technologies. My goal is to grow into an engineer who can build scalable products while effectively integrating AI into real-world applications.
I'm looking for opportunities with startups or product-focused companies where I can contribute, learn from experienced engineers, and continue growing as a developer.
